üìñ Venerable Master Hsuan Hua ‚Äî The Four Clear Instructions on Purity

Venerable Master Hsuan Hua explained that the Four Clear Instructions on Purity in the Shurangama Sutra ‚Äî to end lust, killing, stealing, and lying ‚Äî are deeply connected.
Breaking one easily leads to breaking the others.

He taught that true meditation must come from a pure heart;
if desire is not ended, one‚Äôs cultivation is like trying to cook sand into rice ‚Äî it will never succeed.

üîó Learn more: https://www.drbachinese.org/online_reading/dharma_talks/kaishrlu-6/volume6-ce-26.htm

üí¨ The Shurangama Sutra says:
‚ÄúIf cultivators of Chan samadhi do not cut off lust,
they will be like someone who cooks sand hoping to get rice.
After hundreds of thousands of eons, it will still only be hot sand.‚Äù
üîó From the English Commentary on the Shurangama Sutra (CTTB version):
https://www.cttbusa.org/shurangama6/shurangama6_1.asp

üìñ Venerable Master Hsuan Hua on the Shurangama Mantra

The Shurangama Mantra is the king of mantras because it is the longest and most important. The rise or fall of Buddhism rests entirely on the Shurangama Mantra.

This sutra and mantra are critically important to the preservation of the Proper Dharma. When all is said and done, the Shurangama Sutra is an ode to the Shurangama Mantra. If you can accept and uphold the Shurangama Mantra, then you will definitely become a Buddha in the future.
üîó Read More: https://www.drbachinese.org/online_reading/dharma_talks/ProperDharma_b/Proper_Dharma.b4.htm

üì∫ Listen to the Shurangama Mantra: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cy869k6lbL0

üì∫ Watch  "The Power of the Shurangama Mantra" video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dB7Cs7kw55w

üìå Visit Venerable Master Hsuan Hua‚Äôs Page: https://www.facebook.com/p/ÂÆ£Âåñ‰∏ä‰∫∫Á≤âÁµ≤ÈÝÅ-Venerable-Master-Hsuan-Hua-100063669035968/

üôè Join our 10M Shurangama & 40M Great Compassion Mantras. üì≤ Submit here: https://dulun1918.net/level?l=en-us

üôè Everyone is welcome to join. Every recitation counts! üåç‚ú® May the Dharma shine forever!

#ShurangamaMantra #GreatCompassionMantra #Buddhism #Dharma #BuddhistChanting
